description.value: You have pledged your life and soul to goodness and purity. Granted Powers Touch of Good (Sp): You can touch a creature as a standard action, granting a sacred bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws equal to half your cleric level (minimum 1) for 1 round. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Holy Lance (Su): At 8th level, you can give a weapon you touch the holy special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level, and an additional time per day for every four levels beyond 8th. Domain Spells: 1stâ protection from evil, 2ndâ align weapon (good only), 3rdâ magic circle against evil, 4thâ holy smite, 5thâ dispel evil, 6thâ blade barrier, 7thâ holy word, 8thâ holy aura, 9thâ summon monster IX (good spell only).
